summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend E2E testing of SGIC demo. All 15 backend pytest tests passed (health, auth, embed, extract, robustness, ablation, comparison, graphs). Full frontend E2E flow (Sender embed -> all 6 tabs incl. metrics/viz/comparison/robustness/ablation/graphs, Receiver extract correct-key + wrong-key) all passed. Auth via pre-seeded session token works on both Bearer and cookie. Zero console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: sgic._rs_diff uses double Python loop O(h*w/2) over 256x256 = 32k iterations per call -- slow but acceptable for demo. Could be vectorized with numpy for ~100x speedup.
server.py has no /api/auth/session unit test in the suite (skipped because Emergent OAuth requires live session_id). The cookie-based path is exercised indirectly via Bearer header.
Robustness all FAIL is expected behavior (raw LSB is fragile to noise/JPEG/resize) - confirmed in agent_to_agent_context_note; not flagged as bug.
Frontend file input has hidden attribute (intentional, click delegated to button). Tests must use set_input_files directly on the input - documented in playwright tests.
Backend sgic.py is 449 lines - single file is OK for now but approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting crypto/lsb/metrics/attacks into modules later.
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_sgic_1777978366394 (user researcher@sgic.lab) - confirmed working via /api/auth/me
seed_data_creation: None created (pre-seeded session was already valid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-seeded session in MongoDB user_sessions collection. Use /tmp/sgic/cover.png and /tmp/sgic/stego.png if running again, or regenerate via the helper in test_sgic_api.py _png_bytes(). Frontend file inputs are hidden=true so use set_input_files directly. PROPOSED row in comparison-table contains 'FF3B30' in className for the red highlight check. All endpoints under /api prefix, Bearer auth header works equivalently to cookie.
